function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2025-10-06 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity, subject quoting is safe. Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft was written successfully and no write critique was returned.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft with requested invoice attachment, deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: The inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md was deleted after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by preparing a reply draft to Nina with the requested 2025-10-06 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used inbox processing + email workflows, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, created outbound record in outbox with runtime timestamp, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email frontmatter sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/nina.md`; requested invoice details matched canonical record `50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md`. Workflows required drafting outbound email in `60_outbox/outbox/` and deleting the processed inbox file afterward.
